reviews.review_description: There is no working hand tracking, the multiplayer is non existent, the tiny room in space you get you can just go through walls and amazingly you get a chess board and peices considering they lied about hand tracking and multi-player I’m surprised they added that, I hope this game fails and is taken down, only free chess game I could find and it claims to have multiplayer and doesn’t nor does it have hand tracking as promised so unless you want to play your self, it is not worth it, images on the game are from other chess games that cost money
DOWNLOAD THIS GAME RIGHT NOW IT'S REALLY FUN AND STOP MESSING THE BOARDS UP WHEN PEOPLE ARE PLAYING
This is the best game ever!
Don't waste your time. You'd have a better chance playing in any other app.
